topic: A close-up of a 'Vinyl Record Player' being started.
raw_generation:
{
  "script": "SCENE 1: CLOSE-UP OF VINYL RECORD PLAYER
The camera sits inches from the record as the motor hums to life. Dust motes glitter in a warm beam of light.
A hand enters the frame, steady and deliberate. The platter begins to spin from stillness, speed increasing smoothly.
The tonearm slides into view and glides along its track toward the edge of the record. A finger lowers the stylus with a soft click.
The needle meets the grooves; a subtle crackle erupts as the first notes push through.
The camera pulls back slightly to reveal more of the player as the music swells.

SCENE 2: DETAIL SHOTS
- The stylus tracing a groove; light catching on ridges and valleys.
- The label centered beneath the spinning platter.
- Textures: matte black plinth, chrome edge, wood surround, felt mat, and clear acrylic dust cover reflections.

SCENE 3: AUDIO CUES
- Gentle motor hum, soft vinyl crackle, atmospheric room tone.
- The first notes of the track anchor the moment.",
  "narration": "Close-up on a vinyl record player waking up. The motor hums, the platter spins to life, and the tonearm glides toward the record. With a gentle drop of the needle, the first crackle blooms into music. In this intimate close-up, texture and sound fuse—the matte black, the chrome, the warm light, and the comforting hiss of analog standing still no more."
}

parsed_generation.script:
SCENE 1: CLOSE-UP OF VINYL RECORD PLAYER
The camera sits inches from the record as the motor hums to life. Dust motes glitter in a warm beam of light.
A hand enters the frame, steady and deliberate. The platter begins to spin from stillness, speed increasing smoothly.
The tonearm slides into view and glides along its track toward the edge of the record. A finger lowers the stylus with a soft click.
The needle meets the grooves; a subtle crackle erupts as the first notes push through.
The camera pulls back slightly to reveal more of the player as the music swells.

SCENE 2: DETAIL SHOTS
- The stylus tracing a groove; light catching on ridges and valleys.
- The label centered beneath the spinning platter.
- Textures: matte black plinth, chrome edge, wood surround, felt mat, and clear acrylic dust cover reflections.

SCENE 3: AUDIO CUES
- Gentle motor hum, soft vinyl crackle, atmospheric room tone.
- The first notes of the track anchor the moment.
parsed_generation.narration: Close-up on a vinyl record player waking up. The motor hums, the platter spins to life, and the tonearm glides toward the record. With a gentle drop of the needle, the first crackle blooms into music. In this intimate close-up, texture and sound fuse—the matte black, the chrome, the warm light, and the comforting hiss of analog standing still no more.

feedback: The prompt stays true to the topic and uses a clear close-up progression, but the narration sometimes adds interpretive language that could be trimmed to align with the concise, action-first style in the references. Consider tightening the narration and camera cues to focus strictly on observable actions (start motor, tonearm movement, needle drop) and sequence them linearly. Also ensure Scene 2 bullets reflect the exact visuals from Scene 1 to avoid redundancy.
strengths: Clear scene-based structure that mirrors a close-up progression.
Rich tactile and material detail cues (textures, finishes, reflections).
fixes: Tighten narration toward action-first wording with minimal metaphor.
Synchronize Scene 2 bullets with visible moments in Scene 1 to reduce redundancy.
